headline: Vulcan Materials Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Vulcan Materials (NYSE:VMC) reported a stronger first quarter of 2026 as higher shipments, price realization, and disciplined cost control drove earnings growth, while management also addressed near-term energy inflation and reiterated its full-year outlook.
